---
name: 🐞 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

# 🐞 Bug Report – Help Us Fix It! 🧑‍🚀

## 🐛 What happened?
Describe the issue as clearly as possible.

- What were you trying to do? (e.g. swap, stake, vote)
- What went wrong?
- Did it happen on-chain, in the frontend, or in backend/node?

---

## ✅ Expected behavior
What should have happened instead?

- Expected transaction result
- Expected UI or protocol behavior

---

## 🖥️ Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Ubuntu)
- **Browser / Wallet:** (e.g. Chrome + MetaMask, Keplr, Ledger)
- **Network:** (e.g. Ethereum, Arbitrum, Cosmos Hub, testnet)
- **RPC / Node provider:** (if relevant)
- **App version / Commit hash:**  
- **Smart contract address:** (if applicable)
- **Transaction hash:** (if applicable)

---

## 🔁 Steps to reproduce

1. Connect wallet  
2. Go to '...'  
3. Execute action (swap / stake / vote)  
4. Confirm transaction  
5. Observe error  

---

## ⛓️ On-chain data (if applicable)

- Transaction hash(es)  
- Block number / timestamp  
- Gas settings used  
- Contract interaction details  

---

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs / Traces

- UI screenshots  
- Browser console logs  
- Node / RPC logs  
- Error messages or stack traces  
- Block explorer links (Etherscan, Mintscan, etc.)

---

## 🔐 Security relevance (optional)

- [ ] Funds at risk  
- [ ] Permission / access issue  
- [ ] Potential exploit  

---

## 🙋 Want to help fix it?

- [ ] I want to try fixing it myself  
- [ ] I can help test a fix  
- [ ] Reporting only  

**Skills (optional):**  
(e.g. Solidity, Rust, CosmWasm, frontend)

---

## 🗳️ Governance impact (optional)

- Does this require a protocol upgrade or DAO proposal?
- Any impact on staking, validators, or tokenomics?

---

## 🗒️ Additional context

- Related issues  
- Reproducibility (always / intermittent)  
- Workarounds (if any)
